article_meta.title: Christmas travelers left stranded as airports see mass flight cancelations

reasoning: Mostly solid: flags genuine author-prose spin/emotional language and avoids quoted-source text. One questionable flag ('Misery Map' is a branded feature name attributed to FlightAware) and missed at least one clear subjective adjective elsewhere.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: No quoted or clearly attributed source language was flagged; all items came from the author’s prose.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Flagging 'Misery Map' is questionable since it’s FlightAware’s branded feature explicitly attributed; treating it as author emotionalism overreaches.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed notable subjective/loaded phrases in author prose such as 'disastrous rain storm' and possibly 'barreling through the northeast.'
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Applied defensible labels (Word Choice, Sensationalism) to genuine items; categorization was appropriate for those instances.
